create.alreadyRegistered: You already have a registered wallet. Click the login button below to log in.
create.error: Error during registration, please try again

new.phone: Use a QR code to connect

sso.description: Frak does not store any personal or biometric data. By continuing you accept our <conditionsLink>terms</conditionsLink> and our <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink>.

pairing.title: Sign in with my mobile
pairing.description: Scan this QR code to sign in from your mobile.

sso.redirect: You will be redirected to {{ productName }} in a few seconds.
sso.subTitle: to immediately receive your winnings from <pLink>{{productName}}</pLink>.
sso.title: Create your wallet

profile.notificationDeniedHelp: Notifications blocked by browser. Enable them in browser settings.

addEmail.title: Add your email
addEmail.description: Your email is only used to recover your account if you forget it. It will never be used to send you unsolicited messages.
addEmail.label: Email
addEmail.submitError: Unable to save this email right now. Please try again.

conflict.title: Email already in use
conflict.description: This email is already linked to another wallet. Use a different email or come back later.
conflict.descriptionMergeable: This email is already on another of your accounts. You can combine them into one — we'll guide you through, whether the other account is on this device or another one.

success.title: Email saved
success.description: {{email}} is now linked to your wallet. Set up recovery next so you can recover it if you ever lose access.

card.title: Add your email
card.description: Add your email to be able to recover your wallet later.

discovery.title: Combine your accounts
discovery.description: Pick how you want to confirm — on this device, or on the device that holds your other passkey.
discovery.scanHint: Scan this code with the device that has your other account.

localHint.title: Both passkeys on this device?
localHint.body: Tap above to confirm with the passkey of your other account here. Works automatically if you use iCloud Keychain across your devices.

discovery.localError: We couldn't find the other passkey on this device. Try scanning the code with your other device instead.

preview.title: Combine your accounts
preview.description: We found another account of yours using {{email}}. Here's what will move when you combine them — no changes happen until you confirm.
preview.loadingDescription: We're double-checking both accounts before we show you what will move.
preview.errorDescription: Something went wrong while preparing the combine. Please try again.

gains.title: What you'll get
gains.description: {{referrals}} referrals, {{interactions}} interactions and {{assets}} reward events — all on one account.

funds.title: Funds to move
funds.description: We'll transfer these from your other account to your primary account before combining.

migrate.loadingDescription: We need to know what's on your other account before we move it.
migrate.readyDescription: Tap below to transfer everything from your other account to your primary account in one go.
migrate.title: Moving your funds…
migrate.description: Sending everything to your primary account before we finalise the combine. This takes a few seconds.
migrate.errorDescription: Something interrupted the transfer. Your accounts are safe — tap retry to try again with the latest balances.
migrate.summaryErrorDescription: Tap retry — we need this before we can move your funds.
migrate.summaryError: Loading your balances failed. Tap retry to try again.
migrate.pending: Sending the transfer on-chain — hang tight.
migrate.error: The transfer didn't go through. Tap retry — we'll re-check your balances and try again.

consent.title: Confirm with your other passkey
consent.description: We need a quick confirmation with the passkey from the other account to make sure both belong to you. You'll see a system prompt.

help.title: What happens here
help.description: Your device will ask you to confirm with face, fingerprint or PIN — same as when you log in. We never see your biometrics.

consent.error: We couldn't confirm with the other passkey on this device. Make sure it's available here, then try again.

remote.title: Confirm on your other device
remote.description: Scan this QR code with the device that holds your other passkey and approve the prompt there. We'll continue automatically.
remote.error: We couldn't reach your other device. Try again, or pick a different email.

sign.title: Authorise the combine
sign.description: One last confirmation to bring your two accounts together.
sign.errorDescription: Something interrupted the combine. Your accounts are safe — try again to finish.
sign.error: The combine couldn't be authorised. Tap try again — your accounts are safe.

settling.title: Combining your accounts…
settling.description: We're putting everything together. This usually takes a few seconds.
settling.errorDescription: Something slipped on our side after you authorised. Tap retry — your accounts are safe.

progress.title: Working on it…
progress.body: Linking your accounts, transferring referrals and rewards. Hang tight.

settling.error: The combine couldn't finish. Tap retry — we'll pick up where we left off.

invalidConsent.title: Confirmation expired
invalidConsent.body: Too much time passed since you confirmed with your other passkey. Reconfirm to continue — your accounts are safe.

onChainMismatch.title: Something looks different
onChainMismatch.body: Your accounts moved while we were combining them. Let's start over from the preview — nothing is lost.

migrateReverted.title: Funds didn't move
migrateReverted.body: The transfer didn't land on-chain. Run it again to finish — your accounts are safe.

success.title: Your accounts are now one
success.description: {{email}} is linked to your wallet. Everything from your other account moved over — referrals, history, rewards.

invite.title: Invite your friends to Frak
invite.description: Create your code and share it with your loved ones to earn even more money.

enterCode.title: Enter a referral code
enterCode.description: Earn money on every purchase you make across all partner sites.

create.title: My referral code
create.description: As soon as someone signs up with your code and places an order on one of our partner sites, you both earn money.
create.label: Customize your code
create.hint: Pick 4 letters to generate your code.
create.errorAlreadyActive: You already have an active referral code.
create.errorCodeUnavailable: This code is no longer available, please pick another one.
create.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
create.terms: By sharing or using a code, you agree to <termsLink>FRAK's terms and conditions</termsLink>.

share.shareText: Use my referral code {{code}} to sign up on Frak.

edit.title: Edit my code
edit.attentionBody: Changing your code revokes the previous one. Links you've already shared will stop working.

cancelConfirm.title: Discard changes
cancelConfirm.description: Your current code will be kept. Your changes won't be saved.

redeem.title: Got a referral code?
redeem.description: Enter a friend's or creator's code and you'll both benefit.
redeem.label: Referral code
redeem.errorNotFound: This code does not exist. Make sure it's correct.
redeem.errorSelf: You can't use your own code.
redeem.errorCycle: This code can't be used with your account.
redeem.errorAlreadyRedeemed: You already have an active referral code.
redeem.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

confirmDelete.title:
Delete this
referral code?
confirmDelete.description: You'll no longer benefit from this code on your future purchases. You can add a new one at any time.

transferEmpty.title: You don't have any money to transfer yet
transferEmpty.description: Share products with your friends to start earning money.

pendingGains.subtitle: Pending earnings
pendingGains.heading:
Great news!
Money is waiting for you.
pendingGains.description: A purchase through your link earned you rewards. Collect them now into your wallet.

pendingEmpty.title: You don't have any earnings yet
pendingEmpty.description: As soon as a purchase is made through your sharing link, your earnings will appear here.

transferredEmpty.title: You haven't transferred any earnings yet
transferredEmpty.description: The total of your earnings will appear here once you make a transfer to your bank account.

transferModal.title: Transfer
transferModal.description: Choose one of the following options to transfer your earnings.

wallet.installWebApp:

to find your gains at any time

invite.title: Invite friends, earn $5
invite.text: Earn $5 for each friend you invite. T&C apply

pendingReferral.success: You have claimed your reward successfully!
pendingReferral.text: You got {{eurClaimable}} EUR pending thanks to your referral activities!

recovery.title: Recover a wallet
recovery.needCreatePasskey: You need to create a new passkey on your device
recovery.successful: Recovery is successful, you can now <pLink>login</pLink>

recoverySetup.disclaimer:
Warning
- We do not store any information related to your wallet recovery.
- You are solely responsible for keeping your recovery file and password secure and private.
- The recovery file can be generated now, but the actual recovery process will only be available one week after the file is created to prevent malicious usage.
recoverySetup.title: Recovery setup

button.alreadyRegistered:
You already have a wallet on your device
Redirecting to the login page
button.create: Create your wallet * in a second with biometry
button.error: Error during registration, please try again
button.inProgress:
Wallet creation in progress

register.notice: <sup>*</sup>encrypted digital account where you can find all the content you own, your consumption data and the rewards you earn

registerDemo.title: Try Frak in demo mode
registerDemo.description: Spin up a temporary wallet to explore Frak. No biometrics, no recovery, just a sandbox.

pairing.code: Check that the code is correct

banner.title: Another device is waiting for your signature

inAppBrowser.title: Open in your browser
inAppBrowser.description: For a better experience, open this page in your default browser.
inAppBrowser.warning: You're using an embedded browser. Your experience may be degraded. Tap to open in your browser.

This browser doesn't support all features needed.

Copy this link manually:
{{url}}

Then:
1. Open Safari
2. Tap the address bar
3. Paste and go

email.description: Your email is only used to recover your account if you forget it. It will never be used to send you unsolicited messages.

alreadyUsed.description: {{email}} is already linked to an account. Log in to continue with that wallet, or use a different email.

keypass.description: A secure key is saved in your password manager to quickly log in via biometrics.

info.title: Complete your account to claim your earnings.

info.feature2Description: To receive your earnings directly into your bank account.

kyc.description: To transfer your earnings, you need to verify your identity.

kyc.featureDescription: To secure your account and confirm that you are the rightful owner of the earnings, we use a financial partner, Monerium.

link.title: Link your wallet
link.description: Your wallet is not yet connected to your Monerium account, connect it to transfer your earnings.
link.featureTitle: Link your Monerium account to your wallet
link.featureDescription: To fully use your wallet, we need to link your account.

success.title: You can now transfer your earnings 🎉
